description: Required observational language patterns. At least one should appear in every family-facing report to ensure proper tone and framing.

tone_requirements.voice: warm, empathetic, like a caring friend
tone_requirements.data_translation: transform raw sensor numbers into daily-life observations
tone_requirements.positive_framing: lead with positive observations when possible

data_translation_examples.warm: nighttime activity was a bit more frequent than usual
elder seemed to have some difficulty settling in
steps seemed a bit slower than usual these past few days
daytime activity levels noticeably lower recently
getting up from seated position seemed to take more effort
